items.name: [Animated] Eye Born From Inside 2.0 (Weirdcore)
items.description:
Eye Born From Inside – Description

An unsettling entity awakens beneath the surface. A living eye forces its way outward from within, as if something inside has finally decided to look back at the world. Disturbing, mysterious, and impossible to ignore — this piece captures the moment where the body is no longer empty… and you are no longer alone.
